sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ التَّرْحَالُ يَوْمًا مُجَرَّدَ انْتِقَالٍ فِيزْيَائِيٍّ بَيْنَ الْإِحْدَاثِيَّاتِ الْجُغْرَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje nikada nije bilo puki fizički prijelaz između geografskih koordinata.
sentences.translationEn: Wandering has never been a mere physical transition between geographical coordinates

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهُ بَحْثٌ دَائِمٌ عَنِ الِانْعِتَاقِ السِّيكُولُوجِيِّ مِنْ رِبْقَةِ الْمَأْلُوفِ.
sentences.translation: To je trajna potraga za psihološkim oslobađanjem iz okova svakodnevice.
sentences.translationEn: it is a perpetual quest for psychological liberation from the shackles of the familiar.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ غَوْصٌ فِي لُجَجِ الْمَجْهُولِ لِتَشْكِيلِ ذَاتٍ تَتَجَدَّدُ مَعَ كُلِّ مَحَطَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: To je uranjanje u dubine nepoznatog radi oblikovanja sopstva koje se obnavlja sa svakom stanicom.
sentences.translationEn: It is a plunge into the depths of the unknown to forge a self that renews with every stop.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسَافِرُ الْحَقُّ لَا يَرُومُ اسْتِهْلَاكَ الْمَنَاظِرِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ كَسِلْعَةٍ بَصَرِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Istinski putnik ne teži konzumiranju pejzaža kao vizuelne robe.
sentences.translationEn: The true traveler does not aim to consume landscapes as visual commodities, but rather seeks to melt their soul in the crucible of distant cultures.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ يَسْعَى لِانْصِهَارِ رُوحِهِ فِي بَوْتَقَةِ الثَّقَافَاتِ الْقَاصِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Umjesto toga, on nastoji stopiti svoju dušu u talioni kultura dalekih svjetova.
sentences.translationEn: There, the illusory boundaries between 'the self' and 'the other' dissolve.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ تَتَلَاشَى الْحُدُودُ الْوَهْمِيَّةُ بَيْنَ "الأَنَا" وَ "الآخَرِ".
sentences.translation: Tamo nestaju iluzorne granice između „ja“ i „drugog“.
sentences.translationEn: The winding alleys of ancient cities are profound existential labyrinths, inviting the visitor to re-read human history from a fresh perspective.

sentences.arabic: الْأَزِقَّةُ الْمُلْتَوِيَةُ فِي الْمُدُنِ الْعَتِيقَةِ هِيَ مَتَاهَاتٌ وُجُودِيَّةٌ عَمِيقَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Vijugave uličice drevnih gradova duboki su egzistencijalni labirinti.
sentences.translationEn: One must move away from the superficiality of traditional tourist brochures.

sentences.arabic: تَدْعُو الزَّائِرَ لِإِعَادَةِ قِرَاءَةِ التَّارِيخِ الْإِنْسَانِيِّ مِنْ مَنْظُورٍ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: One pozivaju posjetitelja da iznova iščita ljudsku historiju iz nove perspektive.
sentences.translationEn: The phenomenon of estrangement grants the insightful tourist a unique capacity for contemplation.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ الِابْتِعَادُ عَنْ سَطْحِيَّةِ الْكُتَيِّبَاتِ السِّياحِيَّةِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Potrebno se udaljiti od površnosti tradicionalnih turističkih brošura.
sentences.translationEn: This capacity helps them decode the ciphers of multiple identities.

sentences.arabic: ظَاهِرَةُ الِاغْتِرَابِ تَمْنَحُ السَّائِحَ الْمُتَبَصِّرَ قُدْرَةً فَرِيدَةً عَلَى التَّأَمُّلِ.
sentences.translation: Fenomen otuđenosti pronicljivom turisti daje jedinstvenu sposobnost meditacije.
sentences.translationEn: Every airport becomes a gateway to a parallel world carrying untold stories.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُهُ هَذِهِ الْقُدْرَةُ عَلَى تَفْكِيكِ شِفْرَاتِ الْهَوِيَّاتِ الْمُتَعَدِّدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ta mu sposobnost pomaže u dešifriranju kodova višestrukih identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: The map represents a manuscript for uncovering the secrets of the human soul yearning for knowledge.

sentences.arabic: يُصْبِحُ كُلُّ مَطَارٍ بَوَّابَةً لِعَالَمٍ مَوَازٍ يَحْمِلُ قِصَصًا لَمْ تُحْكَ بَعْدُ.
sentences.translation: Svaki aerodrom postaje kapija paralelnog svijeta koji nosi još neispričane priče.
sentences.translationEn: It becomes clear to us that home is not a fixed, limited spatial entity, but rather a collection of memories and scents we gather.

sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الْخَرِيطَةُ مَخْطُوطَةً لِكَشْفِ أَسْرَارِ النَّفْسِ الْبَشَرِيَّةِ التَّوَّاقَةِ لِلْمَعْرِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mapa predstavlja rukopis za otkrivanje tajni ljudske duše žedne znanja.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, travel becomes a complete philosophy of life and existence.

sentences.arabic: يَتَجَلَّى لَنَا أَنَّ الْوَطَنَ لَيْسَ حَيِّزًا مَكَانِيًّا ثَابِتًا وَمَحْدُودًا.
sentences.translation: Postaje nam jasno da domovina nije fiksni i ograničeni prostorni okvir.
sentences.translationEn: It is a continuous education that does not end with the physical journey's conclusion

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ مَجْمُوعَةٌ مِنَ الذِّكْرَيَاتِ وَالرَّوَائِحِ الَّتِي نَجْمَعُهَا.
sentences.translation: Ona je zapravo skup sjećanja i mirisa koje prikupljamo.
sentences.translationEn: true realization begins upon returning home with a piercing insight.

sentences.arabic: يَغْدُو السَّفَرُ بِذَلِكَ فَلْسَفَةً كَامِلَةً لِلْحَيَاةِ وَالْوُجُودِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje tako postaje potpuna filozofija života i postojanja.
sentences.translationEn: true realization begins upon returning home with a piercing insight.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ تَعْلِيمٌ مُسْتَمِرٌّ لَا يَنْتَهِي بِنِهَايَةِ الرِّحْلَةِ الْجُسْمَانِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: To je neprekidno učenje koje ne završava krajem fizičkog putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: true realization begins upon returning home with a piercing insight.

sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ الْإِدْرَاكُ الْحَقِيقِيُّ عِنْدَ الْعَوْدَةِ إِلَى الدِّيَارِ بِبَصِيرَةٍ نَافِذَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Istinska spoznaja počinje tek povratkom kući s prodornim uvidom.
sentences.translationEn: true realization begins upon returning home with a piercing insight.
